title: Liberal construction
doc_html:
§9256.  Liberal construction

This Chapter, being intended to carry out a governmental function to enhance the welfare of the inhabitants of the portion of the state to be affected hereby, shall be liberally construed by the courts to effect its purposes.

Acts 1985, No. 253, §1, eff. July 6, 1985.
